description_long: This is a classic upright arcade game cabinet, predominantly black with a wide, angular base and a slightly protruding control panel. The front features a large, vertically oriented screen displaying a retro video game, surrounded by a black bezel. The control panel is equipped with two joysticks and several colored buttons, arranged for two-player gameplay, and is slightly slanted for ergonomic access. Above the screen, a marquee panel displays colorful artwork and the Nintendo logo, with cartoon characters and a vibrant orange background. The side panels are plain black, lacking any additional graphics or decals. The cabinet is constructed from sturdy materials, likely wood or MDF with a laminate finish, and is designed to be both visually striking and durable for public use.
description: A black upright arcade game cabinet with a retro game screen, colorful marquee artwork, and a two-player control panel with joysticks and buttons.
description_view_0: Front view showing the game screen, marquee artwork, and the full control panel with joysticks and buttons.
description_view_1: Left side view revealing the cabinet's angular profile and a partial view of the control panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, featureless black back panel.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the cabinet's profile and a partial glimpse of the control panel.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, vertically oriented, slightly curved with a thick black bezel surrounding the display area.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two joysticks (one red, one blue) and six colored buttons arranged in two groups, suitable for two-player side-by-side play; buttons are circular and color-coded.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features colorful cartoon artwork with an orange background, Nintendo branding, and game-themed characters.
